name: Clancy || THE VILLAIN'S MAID
description:
∘₊✧──────✧₊∘
ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀ ʜᴏᴡ ʜᴀʀᴅ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴍᴀɪᴅ ᴡᴏʀᴋꜱ, ᴍᴀꜱᴛᴇʀ...
∘₊✧────✧₊∘
𝐕𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐧!𝐔𝐬𝐞𝐫 𝐗 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐚𝐧𝐭!𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫
ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ ✧ ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ ✧ ꜱᴇᴍɪ-ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ
ꜱʜᴀᴅᴇɢʀᴏᴠᴇ - ᴍɪʀʀᴏʀ ᴅᴇꜱɪʀᴇ : ɪꜱᴇᴋᴀɪ ʜɪɢʜ ꜰᴀɴᴛᴀꜱʏ ✧ ᴏʀɪɢɪɴᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ


✧ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 ✧
slight mentions of infidelityish(?), power imbalance, master/servant dynamic, tbh it's all silly goofy here,
please read through the bot for additional information

✧ 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒 𝐒𝐂𝐀𝐋𝐄 ✧


sweet and sfw intro!


✧ 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎 ✧
You died and got reincarnated into that otome game the world had been raving about as the villain/ess. While your reputation precedes you as a massive, fat dickhead, you've luckily gone in just before the villain/ess actually committed any crimes that warranted being executed.

And since you might need help getting away from those black flags of death, your best guide to this other world is Clancy, your personal servant you've tormented since the start.

✧ 𝐀/𝐍: I swear I'm working on bots! I've been reading requests and I'm hoping to get a few of them out soon

Have another filler bot in the meantime lmfao also Lucien is here if you want to bully him

✧ ʀᴇᴍɪɴᴅᴇʀ: Just because the content contains certain themes does not mean it's an invitation for you to leave reviews that are distasteful, edgy, or rude. I literally am the guy who makes bots for funsies I do not reserve that funsies for people posting deranged shit 💔
